channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Philippines accuses China's forces of harassing fisheries vessels in the South China Sea
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Chinese coast guard ships and a Chinese navy helicopter harassed a group of Philippine fisheries vessels conducting a scientific survey in a hotly disputed area of the South China Sea, forcing them to cancel the operation, the Philippine coast guard said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: China tells Rubio to behave himself in veiled warning
item.description: China’s veteran foreign minister has issued a veiled warning to America’s new secretary of state: Behave yourself.
item.dc:creator: Ken Moritsugu, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Senate heads toward confirming Kristi Noem as Trump's homeland security secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate is heading towards a vote on confirming South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem as homeland security secretary, placing her at the head of a sprawling agency that will be essential to both national security and President Donald Trump's plans to squash illegal immigration.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump's attempt to end birthright citizenship would overturn more than a century of precedent
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has said since his first administration that he wants to end birthright citizenship, a constitutional right for everyone born in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Graham Lee Brewer And Janie Har, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Vance breaks tie to confirm Pete Hegseth as Defense secretary
item.description: Vice President Vance on Friday broke a Senate tie to confirm Pete Hegseth as President Trump's secretary of Defense, capping a bruising two-month fight over the nominee, who faced a litany of allegations that included sexual misconduct, financial mismanagement and excessive drinking. GOP Sens.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WGN 9

item.title: Trump pumps coal as answer to AI power needs but any boost could be short-lived
item.description: CHEYENNE, Wyo. (AP) — President Donald Trump’s promise to go all in on fossil fuels includes praise for coal, a reliable but polluting energy source that's long been in decline.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER and MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Defense Department orders 'pause' of social media accounts
item.description: The Defense Department said it needs time to review its social media programming to match Trump's priorities.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Oregon couple who posed as firefighters during L.A. wildfires charged, face potential jail time
item.description: The Oregon couple who allegedly tried to sneak into a Palisades Fire evacuation zone while impersonating firefighters are facing charges and potential jail time, according to prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Brawl over Pokémon cards breaks out at California Costco
item.description: The fight, captured on video by X user DisguisedToast, unfolded on Jan. 16 at the Costco in Atwater Village, the Los Angeles Times reported.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WGN 9

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: Idaho beefs up firing squad as Bryan Kohbeger trial nears
item.description: A new bill would make the firing squad Idaho's primary means of execution, after the state recently restored it as a backup amid struggles with lethal injection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Newark mayor says ICE agents raided 'without warrant,' violated Constitution
item.description: New Jersey Democratic officials slammed a workplace raid conducted by Immigration and Customs Enforcement at a seafood market in Newark on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The man pushed onto New York's subway tracks says he will ride again
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A man who survived being shoved onto subway tracks ahead of an oncoming train said that in spite of the physical and psychological trauma, he eventually plans to make his way back to the train.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: London court clears way to extradite US mother accused of killing 2 of her children in Colorado
item.description: LONDON (AP) — A London judge on Friday rejected a U.S. mother's challenge to her extradition to face murder charges in Colorado in the deaths of two of her young children.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mississippi bill would pay bounty hunters to catch undocumented immigrants
item.description: A Mississippi District Attorney proposed new legislation on Wednesday to pay bounty hunters a reward for helping to deport undocumented immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Target is ending its diversity goals as a strong DEI opponent occupies the White House
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Discount store chain Target said Friday that it would join rival Walmart and a number of other prominent American brands in scaling back diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives that have come under attack from conservative activists and, as of this week, the White House.
item.dc:creator: ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Spirit Airlines updates dress code, tattoo policy for passengers
item.description: Passengers flying on Spirit Airlines can now be removed from a flight if a tattoo or other "body art" is deemed "lewd, obscene, or offensive.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Homeowners in Palisades Fire area angered by bank's decision
item.description: With the devastating Palisades Fire still smoldering in California, Lisa Pelton and some of her neighbors in Mandeville Canyon received an unpleasant notice from their bank: Their home equity lines of credit were being slashed.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: 80 Guatemalan migrants deported from Biggs Army Airfield
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (KTSM) — The U.S. Department of Defense, along with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), deported 80 Guatemalan migrants on Friday morning, Jan. 24, from Biggs Army Airfield at Fort Bliss, U.S. Rep. Tony Gonzales, R-Texas said in a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Luna, NewsNation

item.title: Just days into the new Trump administration, worries spike amid a show of force on immigration
item.description: Less than a week into his presidency, the Trump administration is touting deportation efforts and has published new rules making it easier to remove people.
item.dc:creator: Mike Catalini And Rebecca Santana, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: White House says migrant deportation flights with military aircraft have begun
item.description: The Trump administration has started flying immigrants who entered the U.S. illegally out of the country using military aircraft, a White House spokesperson said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ford recalls over 270,000 Broncos and Mavericks: Here's why
item.description: Ford Motor Co. is recalling 272,827 Broncos and Mavericks due to a power problem that can cause vehicles to stop unexpectedly or fail to start.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ford recalls more than 270,000 Broncos and Mavericks due to loss of power problem
item.description: Ford Motor Co. is recalling 272,827 Broncos and Mavericks due to a power problem that can cause vehicles to stop unexpectedly or fail to start.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Resale prices for iPhones 'with TikTok installed' soar up to $50,000
item.description: TikTok is no longer available in the App Store as of Thursday, however there's still a way to get back on the platform – for a price.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Judge to weigh genetic evidence and search warrants in University of Idaho quadruple murder case
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Attorneys for a man charged with murder in connection with the killings of four University of Idaho students are asking a judge to throw out most of the evidence in the case because they say it all hinges on an unconstitutional genetic investigation process.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Police review writings tied to Nashville school shooter who killed female student and himself
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The investigation into why a Nashville high school student fatally shot a classmate before killing himself has centered on his online writings, which authorities describe as concerning warning signs.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI and KRISTIN M. HALL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to know about President Donald Trump's order targeting the rights of transgender people
item.description: An executive order President Donald Trump signed on his first day back in office offers a new federal government definition of the sexes that could have a major impact on transgender people nationwide.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL and CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Convicted killer sings in front of victims' families
item.description: A man convicted of murdering two women in 1986 interrupted his own sentencing hearing on Tuesday by singing in front of his victims' families.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Trump won't ban immigration arrests at churches. Now clergy are weighing how to resist
item.description: Numerous faith leaders across the U.S. say the immigration crackdown launched by President Donald Trump’s new administration has sown fear within their migrant-friendly congregations.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, LUIS ANDRES HENAO and DEEPA BHARATH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Samsung S25 Lineup: Lighter, Faster, More AI
item.description: Samsung held their latest unpacked event in the heart of Silicon Valley in San Jose. It's where AI is a major buzzword and that was certainly the case up on stage as Samsung unveiled its Galaxy S25 lineup of smartphones.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Over 50,000 under evacuation orders or warnings as wildfire imperils homes north of Los Angeles
item.description: CASTAIC, Calif. (AP) — More than 50,000 people were under evacuation orders or warnings Wednesday as a huge and fast-moving wildfire swept through rugged mountains north of Los Angeles, but fire officials said a rapid ground and air assault was giving them the upper hand.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER and MARCIO JOSE SANCHEZ, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Previously approved refugee flights to US canceled after Trump order
item.description: The U.S. refugee program is considered one of the most rigorous on the globe, providing a pathway to safe haven for those fleeing danger or who has faced persecution due to their race, religion, nationality or political views.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, WGN 9

item.title: Thousands of Vornado space heaters recalled over potential 'shock and fire' hazards
item.description: Thousands of Vornado space heaters sold on Amazon have been recalled amid concerns over possible "electric shock and fire hazards," according to the company.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, Fox 5

item.title: An estimated 24.6 million watched the inauguration, the smallest audience since 2013
item.description: The Nielsen Company said viewership was down from Joe Biden's 2021 inauguration, which reached 33.8 million, and Trump's first move into the White House, seen by 30.6 million in 2017.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump demands apology from bishop who asked him to ‘have mercy’ on transgender kids, immigrants
item.description: President Donald Trump early Wednesday morning slammed the reverend at a National Cathedral prayer service for the inauguration who called on him to have mercy on transgender children and immigrant families.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, ABC 4

item.title: Trump’s blanket Jan. 6 pardons stun Republicans on Capitol Hill
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping pardons of more than 1,500 people charged with crimes related to the Capitol riot of Jan. 6, 2021, including individuals who assaulted police officers, stunned Republican lawmakers who witnessed firsthand the chaos on Capitol Hill four years ago.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Trump orders FAA to terminate DEI hiring efforts
item.description: President Donald Trump on Tuesday issued an executive order directing the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) to "return to non-discriminatory, merit-based hiring" and eliminate diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9
